raw_text:
```json
{
  "claims": [
    "Assemblymember Haney's AB 1136 will require Mixed Martial Arts promoters to set aside a portion of their ticket sales for a California state-run retirement benefit fund for combat sports.",
    "Currently, MMA fighters do not have a guaranteed source of income or retirement benefits once their careers have ended.",
    "Many MMA fighters have long-term injuries from their time in the ring.",
    "The fund will be financed through ticket sales, sports paraphernalia, and souvenirs.",
    "For every ticket sold, $1 will go towards the MMA Fighters Pension Fund.",
    "MMA fighters will become vested in the fund between 12-14 fights, which is around 39 scheduled rounds at Commission-regulated MMA events.",
    "The annual notice to MMA fighters will detail how they can withdraw funds from the pension fund to be used on medical bills or to fund their education."
  ]
}
```
